title: Satureja nubigena
taxonomy: Satureja nubigena is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. It belongs to the genus Satureja, which includes various species of flowering plants. Satureja nubigena is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is often found growing in rocky, mountainous areas. The plant is known for its fragrant foliage and produces small, white or pink flowers. As a member of the Lamiaceae family, Satureja nubigena is closely related to other mint family plants, such as oregano and thyme.
